# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated by the Monarchy Law Auto Replacer
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

namespace = utopian
utopian.1 = { # Utopian commune
	type = country_event
	placement = scope:utopian_community_state_scope

	title = utopian.1.t
	desc = utopian.1.d
	flavor = utopian.1.f

	event_image = {
		video = "africa_prosperous_farm"
	}

	on_created_soundeffect = "event:/SFX/UI/Alerts/event_appear"

	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/invention_icons/romanticism.dds"

	cooldown = { days = very_long_modifier_time }

	duration = 3

	trigger = {
		any_scope_character = {
			OR = {
				has_role = politician
				has_role = agitator
			}
			has_ideology = ideology:ideology_utopian
		}
		any_scope_state = {
			is_incorporated = yes
			free_arable_land > 5
		}
	}

	immediate = {
		random_scope_character = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_role = politician
					has_role = agitator
				}
				has_ideology = ideology:ideology_utopian
			}
			save_scope_as = utopian_leader_scope
		}
		random_scope_state = {
			limit = {
				is_incorporated = yes
				free_arable_land > 5
			}
			save_scope_as = utopian_community_state_scope
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = utopian.1.a
		default_option = yes
		scope:utopian_community_state_scope = {
			add_modifier = {
				name = modifier_utopian_commune
				days = normal_modifier_time
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = utopian.1.b
		scope:utopian_community_state_scope = {
			add_modifier = {
				name = modifier_utopian_commune
				days = normal_modifier_time
				multiplier = 0.5
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = utopian.1.c
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_censorship
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_outlawed_dissent
			}
			calc_true_if = { # Various conservative laws
				amount >= 2
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_autocracy
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_oligarchy
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_landed_voting
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
			}
		}
		scope:utopian_community_state_scope = {
			add_radicals_in_state = {
				value = small_radicals
				strata = middle
			}
		}
	}
}
